  • 1-800-239-3219VOCAL — Victims of Crime and Leniency
  • 1-800-650-6522Alabama Coalition Against Domestic Violence

24/7 victim services hotlines

Tap a number to call.

  • 1-800-239-3219VOCAL — Victims of Crime and Leniency
  • 1-800-650-6522Alabama Coalition Against Domestic Violence
  • 1-800-656-4673RAINN Sexual Assault Hotline
See more hotlines

Emergency Hotlines

Privacy Policy: This site does not collect, store, or track any personal information. No user data is saved, tracked, or shared. All searches are processed only in your browser and are never sent to a server or stored anywhere.

If you are in immediate danger, call 911. Otherwise, tap a number below to call.

  • 911Emergency services
  • 988Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
  • 1-800-239-3219VOCAL — Victims of Crime and Leniency
  • 1-800-650-6522Alabama Coalition Against Domestic Violence
  • 1-800-799-7233National Domestic Violence Hotline
  • 1-800-656-4673RAINN / National Sexual Assault Hotline
  • 1-888-373-7888National Human Trafficking Hotline
  • Text 233733Human trafficking help (text "HELP" or "INFO")
  • 1-800-422-4453Childhelp National Child Abuse Hotline
  • 1-800-799-7233Safety planning & relationship support
